name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: Time is running out
body:
| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

**We are still short of reaching our April fundraising goals.** [**Will you please ensure we meet them by following this link to contribute $15, $25 or more right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27414528:26365650859:m:1:877327319:5DD0F62E6537E2787DC5804B366E9379:r)

**Unlike President Obama, I will not mince words**. We are in a war against radical Islam. We will never enjoy a peaceful coexistence with the followers of radical Islam because they are committed to destroying us and our way of life. However, **America can have "Security Through Strength," and I will continue to lead that fight.** We must fight them over there to keep them from coming here. And, Friend -- our country cannot afford a third term of Obama which is what Hillary Clinton represents.

My decision on a potential run for President will come soon, but before it does, Friend, I need to know if you stand with me. If you agree that we need a candidate who has significant foreign policy experience and will lead our country with strength not weakness, then [**I hope you will click here to follow this link right now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27414528:26365650859:m:1:877327319:5DD0F62E6537E2787DC5804B366E9379:r)

The actions you take today will ensure Security Through Strength can reach like-minded Americans across the country and spread our message to keep America strong as part of our ongoing efforts testing the waters.

[**Not much time remains in April, and I need your immediate support to ensure we reach our monthly goals**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27414528:26365650859:m:1:877327319:5DD0F62E6537E2787DC5804B366E9379:r).

Please show your support by making a much needed contribution today.**

Sincerely,

Senator Lindsey Graham

P.S. I will make my decision soon, but first, I am counting on your support today to ensure we are able to post strong numbers. [**Please follow this link to make your secure online contribution today**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27414528:26365650859:m:1:877327319:5DD0F62E6537E2787DC5804B366E9379:r).

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27414528:26365650859:m:1:877327319:5DD0F62E6537E2787DC5804B366E9379:r) |

_Security Through Strength is a 527 political organization registered with the Internal Revenue Service._

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWECH9b1NN).
[Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWECH9b1NN) | [Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWECH9b1NN)

name: Josh Wolf, MurphyForFlorida.com
subject: Control of the Senate comes down to this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Control of the Senate in 2016 could all come down to one race:Friend -- Control of the Senate in 2016 could all come down to one race: Patrick Murphy's run for U.S. Senate in Florida. **Don 't take our word for it. **Larry Sabato, one of the most respected political analysts in the country, is calling the Florida Senate race one of the most important and competitive contests in 2016. _" Florida is one of the three or four most important swing states in American politics, and it should be little surprise that an open-seat, presidential-year Senate contest could wind up being extremely competitive... both the presidency and control of the Senate could depend on it."_ The stakes could not be higher. Patrick Murphy's run for Senate is the best pickup opportunity for Democrats in the country. Winning is crucial to taking back the Senate. **We need to hit 3,000 online donations by Thursday 's fundraising deadline. Can you chip in to help us get there?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-april2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-04-28_b1_jw_ldnd-rem&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[Chip in $35 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. name: Jared Milrad
subject: The freedom to marry
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Today is the day. | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI1NTg2MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyOTY5OTEyS0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

Today, the Supreme Court is hearing oral arguments for a set of cases that could pave the way for same-sex marriage across the country.

My partner Nate and I don't need to wait for the decision. We got engaged at the historic Stonewall Inn in New York -- and like we shared in Hillary's campaign launch video, we're getting married in Chicago this summer.

But not everyone has that same freedom. In too many states, it's still against the law for two men or two women to make a commitment to love and care for each other. Dads can't adopt children. Moms can't visit one another in the hospital.

Our country has made so much progress in just the last ten years that marriage equality can often feel inevitable. But that is, unfortunately, wishful thinking. It can all be turned back with just one election.

There are some on the other side, including some who are running for president, who find my relationship intolerable. They see me and those like me as second-class citizens, unworthy of our right to pursue happiness.

As we saw just last month in Indiana -- and as we continue to see around the world -- people who are committed to discrimination can still find ways to act on it.

**That's why I'm writing to you, and why I was proud to help launch Hillary's campaign. She's been an advocate for equality for gay, lesbian, bisexual, and transgender Americans. She understands that my family is like her family and yours. We all deserve equal rights.
**
The arguments in front of the Supreme Court today are the beginning of what we hope is the final step before nationwide marriage equality.

But no matter what happens in the courts, I'm hopeful that come 2016, we'll elect a president who fights for all of us.

Thanks for taking the time to read this.

Jared Milrad [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI1NTg2MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyOTY5OTEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI1NTg2MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyOTY5OTEyS0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI1NTg2MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyOTY5OTEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
